track_a_propacks_only.label: ProPacks Only (LCD state)
track_a_propacks_only.subject: Post-op incision care for {practice_name}
track_a_propacks_only.body:
Dr. {last_name},

{volume_hook}, I wanted to reach out about a post-op incision care kit that has been getting strong traction with orthopedic practices across the Northeast.

ProPacks are standardized post-operative incision kits built specifically for {procedure_focus} patients. Four things practices tell us consistently:

1. Better, more predictable outcomes - fewer calls, fewer wound checks, fewer readmissions.
2. Meaningfully less physician time on post-op wound management.
3. Full compliance and audit protection - one documented, reproducible standard across every case.
4. Increased per-case profitability vs. the piecemeal approach most practices use today.

Would you be open to a 15-minute intro call, or better, a lunch & learn at your {city} office in the next few weeks? I can bring samples and a one-pager on outcomes.

Best,
{sender_name}
{sender_title}
{sender_email}
